2026-04-14T08:15:32.5490710Z ---
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5491214Z description: |
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5531251Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5532457Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5533316Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5533826Z 
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5533971Z on:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5534296Z   push:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5534627Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5535016Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5535246Z 
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5535408Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5535656Z 
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5535811Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5536026Z 
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5536188Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5536568Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5537019Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5537362Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5537714Z   noop:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5538057Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5538454Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5538786Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5539396Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5540102Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5540533Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5540973Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5541463Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5544016Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5544549Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5544944Z       steps:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5545332Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5545862Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5546343Z           env:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5546931Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5547629Z           with:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5547980Z             script: |
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5548481Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5549123Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5549811Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5550443Z                 return;
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5550849Z               }
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5551083Z 
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5551540Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5552622Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5553132Z 
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5553572Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5554399Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5555219Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5556103Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5556699Z               }
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5556910Z 
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5557317Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5557905Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5558360Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5558883Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5559358Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }

2026-04-14T08:15:32.5570051Z

2026-04-14T08:15:32.5570590Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5571049Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5571399Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5571734Z   noop:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5602630Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5603111Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5603460Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5604083Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5604809Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5605245Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5605691Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5606184Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5606554Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5606998Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5607370Z       steps:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5607757Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5608271Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5610316Z           env:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5610964Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5611662Z           with:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5640265Z             script: |
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5640829Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5641471Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5642843Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5643680Z                 return;
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5644065Z               }
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5644281Z 
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5644507Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5645213Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5645722Z 
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5646166Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5647001Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5647817Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5648788Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5649369Z               }
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5649575Z 
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5649842Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5673345Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5673853Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5674396Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5674889Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5675407Z               });
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5675879Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5676321Z 
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5676467Z tools:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5676799Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5677134Z   github:
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5677491Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5677785Z

2026-04-14T08:15:32.5678539Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5679216Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-14T08:15:32.5689914Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
